title: Helinus spartioides
taxonomy: Helinus spartioides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Helinus and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is a shrub or small tree that is often found in dry and rocky areas. Helinus spartioides is commonly known as the "Horned Celastrus" due to its distinctive shape. This classification places Helinus spartioides within the broader context of the plant kingdom.
